message: Show each URL on its own line in web_contents tool header

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Visible URLs in web_contents tool call header
+type: change
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2026-03-12T10:12:55.611363Z
+---
+
+The `web_contents` tool call header now displays each URL on its own line
+instead of showing only a count. This makes it easy to see which pages are being
+fetched without expanding the tool call.
